calendar.matters:
Petition Of Lisa Renee Goodyard To Perpetuate Testimony Of George Goodyard By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar May-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Lisa Tandoc, Esq., for petitioner and moving party: Lisa Goodyard
No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner Lisa Goodyard's petition to perpetuate testimony of George Goodyard is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
